question.label: Needed to change
question.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear to you?
question.description: Clarifies the specific expectations gap he named after the promotion decision.

answer: I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.

assessment.note: He narrowed his response to controllable delivery work, which signals strong disengagement from the broader question of what to change; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'delivery because that felt controllable' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Feedback he got
new_queue.name: What feedback do you remember actually hearing from that process?

new_queue.label: Feedback that stuck
new_queue.name: What part of that feedback has stayed with you?

new_queue.label: Mentoring fit
new_queue.name: What is mentoring giving you that your core product work is not?

new_queue.label: Concrete path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?

new_queue.label: Next step from me
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to make the next couple of weeks steadier?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
